lastAction: HB451: Built Minecraft Content Series Planner widget. Research: Series content outperforms one-offs (Packapop, Filmora, Subscribr data shows Hardcore 100 Days and episodic formats drive higher retention). Build: 7 pre-built templates with full episode breakdowns — Hardcore 100 Days (10 eps), Mod Showcase (6 eps), Creature Evolution (7 eps), AI Pet Care (8 eps), Battle Tournament (9 eps), Tutorial (5 eps), Cinematic Story (6 eps). Features: episode hooks, focus areas, SEO keywords, thumbnail patterns, export to markdown.

currentPriorities.youtube: Series planning tools — Series Planner widget live

recentFeedback.feedback: Steven wants browser-based tools only, not local apps

lessonsLearned: All tools must be browser-accessible — Steven uses a different computer
Data in the dashboard > standalone tools
Fewer better entries > many mediocre ones
BBlocks-style thumbnails with bold text chips perform better
Series content outperforms one-offs — build tools that enable episodic planning
nextPriority: Test Series Planner widget with Steven, gather feedback on template usefulness
